extracted_json.title: Step 3: Execute the Plan (SPSP Process)

items.text: SP1: (from the plan) steps : execute : 1-2 hrs plan

blocks.text: How should I present my results: Table ?

extracted_json.summary_topic_line: Step 3 of the SPSP process: executing the plan and presenting results in a table.
extracted_json.summary_gist: These notes cover Step 3 (Execute the plan) of the SPSP process. The plan is executed across sub-plans SP1, SP2, and SP3, each with estimated time durations (1-2 hrs, 2-4 hrs, 2-4 hrs). The notes then ask how to present results, suggesting a table format with a Needs column (examples: ease of use, performance, reliability), an Assessment column, and additional unspecified columns.
